seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: PERFECT CURLS: The Paul Anthony 30mm Ceramic Hot Brush styler has a 110mm long heating barrel, with rubberised handgrip, cool touch tip and rest stand.
FIVE TEMPERATURES: The styler has 5 versatile heat settings 120C, 140C, 160C, 180C and 200C with illuminated on/off switch, 360 degree swivel cord and is suitable for all hair types.

QUICK HEAT UP: The fast acting PTC heating technology reaches your prefered temperature within seconds. A 60 minute auto-shut off safety feature means you dont need to worry if you accidentally leave the appliance on.

KERATIN: Keratin is a natural type of protein in your skin, hair, and nails. A keratin treatment adds additional keratin to your hair, which can help to reduce frizz, increase shine, and strengthen hair. If you have curly or wavy hair, keratin treatments can also make your hair firmer.
COOL TOUCH: The cool touch tip and ergonomic rubberised handle makes this styler easy to control.
description: Product Description This Paul Anthony Styler allows you to be creative with waves or curls and is suitable for all hair types. For dry hair only. The versatile temperature control has 5 different illuminated heat settings at a touch of a button, 120C, 140C, 160C, 180C and 200C. The maximum temperature is reached in seconds using the new PTC technology, meaning you dont have to wait long to create your perfect style. The Paul Anthony Styler has a 60 minute safety auto-shut off for those times you accidentally leave on, and a cool touch tip for two handed use. The keratin coated heating plates help to reduce hair damage, while reducing frizz and increasing the shine and strength. A 2 Year Manufacturers Warranty comes with this product on registration within 28 days. The pack contains: 1x Paul Anthony Styler 1x Instruction Manual. Safety Warning Hot Surface
